user.name: JunSeo
user.bio: Studying the deep architecture of complex systems to discover vulnerabilities where they are least expected.
user.about: A cybersecurity researcher focused on the internals of modern software.
user.v1_bio:
Studying Cybersecurity research of real-world exploitation and deep system internals.
 I deconstruct complex systems to build safer architectures and discover novel attack vectors.
 Also work hard(not pretty hard, but try to) for rest and peace someday.

bio.title: ABOUT
bio.content: A cybersecurity researcher focused on the internals of modern software. I deconstruct systems—from the V8 engine's JIT optimizations to the core of Linux and macOS kernels—to build more resilient architectures.

experience.title: Academic Affairs Director at SSG
experience.meta: Sejong Security Groups club Academic Affairs Director · 2026.01.21 ~

experience.title: General Manager at SSG
experience.meta: Sejong Security Groups club General Manager · 2025.09.01 ~ 2026.01.20

focus.long_desc: JIT compilation artifacts, Turbofan optimization flaws
Ring 0 behaviors, privilege escalation, heap grooming
Firmware extraction, JTAG debugging, embedded systems
CVE reconstruction, zero-day research in production environments

focus.short_desc: Building connections in the security community.
focus.long_desc: Building connections in the security community.

projects.title: IPCam Research
projects.desc: Firmware extraction & mobile app decompilation. 5 CVEs / 3 KVEs.
projects.long_desc: Analyzing vulnerabilities in IP Cameras through firmware extraction, reverse engineering, and hardware debugging. Also decompiled and analyzed the mobile application associated with the IP cameras. Reported 5 CVEs and 3 KVEs.

projects.title: Web3 BugBounty
projects.long_desc: Solved Ethernaut challenges and conducted bug hunting targeting BlackHole DeFi on code4rena. Submitted 1 report, review in progress.

projects.title: Reflective XSS Fuzzer
projects.long_desc: A tool that automates finding reflective XSS vulnerabilities by injecting payloads and analyzing responses. Built using Python with comprehensive payload lists.
